keywords.note: categoryTokens = preserved full names; keywordTokens = inverted-index tokens (normalized phrases since E-class bug fix). If multi-word category names appear fragmented in keywordTokens, this is a regression of the E-class bug.

rules.name: Stalwarts
rules.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, this unit can use this Battle Trait. When it does, if it is Battle-shocked, it is no longer Battle-shocked and, until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back and/or while within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

rules.name: Painful Lessons
rules.description: Each time a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit makes an attack against this unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

rules.name: Our Time is Nigh
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Once per battle, when the bearer's unit declares a charge, the bearer can use the Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

rules.name: Armour of the Soulless Sentry
rules.description: Improve the Toughness and Save characteristics of the bearer by 1.

rules.name: Footsloggers
rules.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Focused Gunners
rules.description: Models in this unit do not suffer the penalty to Hit rolls for making ranged attacks while their unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

rules.name: Archeotech Nano-med
rules.description: **^^Infantry^^** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, you can choose to roll one D6 at the end of the phase instead of using any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed. If you do, on a 4+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where they were destroyed and more than 1" away from all enemy models, with D3 wounds remaining. If the bearer was part of an Attached unit when it was destroyed, and its Bodyguard unit is still on the battlefield when the bearer is set back up, it must be placed in Unit Coherency with that unit again to form an Attached unit. You do not need to take an Out of Action test for the bearer at the end of the battle unless it is destroyed again.

rules.name: Gene-sire's Reliquant
rules.description: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for the bearer's unit.

rules.name: Leaping Frenzy
rules.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, adding 1 to the result if this unit has 1 or more Warp counters: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

rules.name: Relentless Hunger
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

rules.name: Shock Cavalry
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

rules.name: Will of the Hive Mind
rules.description: Once per battle round, oneÂ model from your army with this ability can use itÂ when a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit within 12" of thatÂ model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduceÂ the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

rules.name: Warp Focus (Psychic)
rules.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in this unit. While this unit has one or more Warp counters, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

rules.name: Reactive Redeployment
rules.description: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this unit. When doing so, you can set this unit up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Unrelenting
rules.description: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this unit's Move characteristic. In addition, each time this unit makes a Normal move, models in this unit can move through terrain, but if any do so, after this unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1-3 this unit is Battle-shocked.

rules.name: War Beasts
rules.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

rules.name: Born Hunter
rules.description: This unit has the Scouts 9" ability.

rules.name: Biosplint Gland
rules.description: Each time the bearer's unit ends Charge moved, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer. Until the end of the turn, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from that attack's Hit roll.

rules.name: Hammer of the Heavens
rules.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use this ability. Select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Command phase, roll six D6 for each unit within 6" of the centre of that marker, adding 2 to the roll for each unit within 3" of the centre of that marker: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound. The marker is then removed.

rules.name: Shocking Celerity
rules.description: This unit has the Fights First ability.

rules.name: Martial Espionage
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Once Per turn, when a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** or **^^Astra Militarum Mounted^^**unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

rules.name: Warp-touched Weapon
rules.description: **^^Infantry^^** or **^^Mounted^^** model only. Select one melee weapon that the bearer is equipped with (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or upgraded via the Weapon Modifications Battle Trait). That weapon is now a Crusade Relic and you add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristic of that weapon. In addition, each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first remove up to 3 Warp counters from the bearer's unit. For each Warp counter removed this way, until the end of the phase, add an additional 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of that weapon.

rules.name: Horror-hardened
rules.description: You can target this unit with Stratagems even while it is Battle-shocked.

rules.name: Rod of Command
rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, before drawing cards from your Secondary Mission deck, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can look at the top card of your Secondary Mission deck, then you can return that card to the bottom of your Secondary Mission deck.

rules.name: Terror Assault
rules.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit with Engagement Range of this unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

rules.name: Sanguiflamme of Armageddon
rules.description:
At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control, you can choose one of the following:

- Remove 1 Warp counter that the bearer's unit has. If you do, gain 1CP.
- Take a Leadership test for this model. If that test is passed, gain 1CP.

rules.name: Maelstrom Clarion
rules.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

rules.name: Piercing Talons
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time a model in the Bearer's unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

rules.name: Conversion Field
rules.description: Models in the bearer's unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks and each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model in the bearer's unit, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks.

rules.name: Lantern of Detestation
rules.description: At the start of your opponent's Movement phase, for each enemy unit (excluding **^^Imperium^^** and **^^Chaos^^** units) within Engagement Range of the bearer, roll one D6: on a 4+. until the end of the phase, that unit cannot be selected to Fall Back.

rules.name: Battle-scarred Resistance
rules.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

rules.name: Duellist
rules.description: Each time a **^^Character^^** model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

rules.name: Giantslayers
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack against a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

rules.name: Cranium Obscura
rules.description: Cannot be taken by **^^Psyker^^** models. Each time a Psychic Attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from that attack's Hit roll.

rules.name: Denunciator of Tyrants
rules.description: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit Roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

rules.name: Predatory Urge
rules.description: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

rules.name: Crippling Damage
rules.description: This unit cannot Advance and you must subtract 1"Â from the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Cavalry Outriders
rules.description: This unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

rules.name: Riftwalker's Astrolabe
rules.description: The bearer has the Deep Strike ability. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

rules.name: Hunting Beasts
rules.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

rules.name: Assassination Edict
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

rules.name: Tank Hunter
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, re-roll a Wound of 1.

rules.name: Pouncing Predators
rules.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and each time you do so, until the end of the turn, this unit has the Fights First ability.

rules.name: Nimble Defence
rules.description: Each time a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit makes an attack against this unit, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against that attack.

rules.name: Sweeping Blow
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if a Critical Wound is rolled, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

rules.name: Predatory Senses
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

rules.name: Artificer Weapon
rules.description: Select one weapon that the bearer is equipped with (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or upgraded via the Weapon Modifications Battle Trait). Make a note on the bearer's Crusade card of this weapon and give it a suitable name. That weapon is now a Crusade Relic and each time the bearer makes an attack with it, on a Critical Hit, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

rules.name: Force Shield (Psychic)
rules.description: Each time an attack targets this unit (excluding Psychic Attacks), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

rules.name: Sigil of Psychic Amplification
rules.description: **^^Psyker^^** model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of the bearer's ranged **[PSYCHIC]** weapons. If the bearer has Psychic ability that instructs you to select one or more units within a specified range, you can increase the range of that ability by 6". If the bearer has a Psychic Aura ability, increase the range of that ability by an additional 3".

rules.name: Behemoth
rules.description: Add 2 to the Wounds characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Warding Inscriptions
rules.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds. While this unit has one or more Warp counters, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

rules.name: The Hero Returned
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1

rules.name: Indomitable Stature
rules.description: Each time a ranged attack is made against this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit's Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from that attack's Wound roll.

rules.name: Monstrous Momentum
rules.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Perfectly Adapted
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll, one Advance roll, one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer

rules.name: Serpentine Tactics
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults Mounted^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

rules.name: Totemic Presence
rules.description: Add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of one model in this unit.

rules.name: Stubborn Explorator
rules.description: Each time this unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move over terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

rules.name: Archeotech Power Cell
rules.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Obdurate Obedience
rules.description: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all models in this unit.

rules.name: Skilled Riders
rules.description: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, its models can move through sections of terrain features more than 2" in height, but if any do so, just after this unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and is Battle-shocked; on a 2-3 this unit is Battle-shocked.

rules.name: Massive Stomp
rules.description: Each time this unit is selected to fight in the Fight phase, before making any attacks, it can stomp. If it does so, select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster^^** and **^^Vehicle^^** units) within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

rules.name: Synaptic Auger
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

rules.name: High-speed Gunnery
rules.description: Each time this unit Advances, until the end of the turn all ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

rules.name: Battle-weary
rules.description: Each time this unit takes a Battle-shock, Leadership,Â Desperate Escape or Out of Action test, subtract 1 fromÂ that test.

rules.name: Talismanic
rules.description: Each time this unit is Marked for Greatness, it gains an additional 2XP.

rules.name: Territorial
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit is within range of an objective marker, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

rules.name: Take to the Skies
rules.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Fight phase, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Reinforced Superstructure
rules.description: Each time an attack with a Strength characteristic of 7 or less is allocated to a model in this unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

rules.name: Noctic Shield
rules.description: Add 1 to the Toughness and Wounds characteristic of the bearer. Once per battle, when an attack targets the bearer's unit, if your Crusade army is in the Defensive Strategic Footing, the bearer can activate this Crusade Relic. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

rules.name: Vertebrax of Vodun
rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, select one friendly model on the battlefield (excluding the bearer) and then select one Aura ability that selected model has. Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer has that Aura ability.

rules.name: Shard of Dying Light
rules.description: **^^Psyker^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to that attack's Wound roll.

rules.name: Treasure of the Technomandrites
rules.description:
Select one weapon equipped by the bearer (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or upgraded via the Weapon Modifications table), then select one of the abilities below for that weapon to gain. That weapon is now a Crusade Relic; note this on the bearer's Crusade card and give the weapon a suitable name.

- **[LETHAL HITS]**
- **[PRECISION]**
- **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**

rules.name: Blur of Speed
rules.description: Models in this unit have the Stealth ability.

rules.name: Assault Commando
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

rules.name: Elite Crew
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

rules.name: Stalker
rules.description: **^^Vanguard Invader^^** model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

rules.name: Extra Armour
rules.description: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Bio-acid Burns
rules.description: **^^Character^^** models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

rules.name: Thundering Onslaught
rules.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

rules.name: Lead From The Front
rules.description: This unit has the Infiltrators ability.

rules.name: Fleet of Foot
rules.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls for this unit and this unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced. In addition, if this unit is selected to Advance, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this unit.

rules.name: Alien Cunning
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Tyranids^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Battle-scarred Resistance
rules.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

rules.name: Gargantuan Rage
rules.description: Melee weapons models in this unit are equipped with have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

rules.name: Shadow Stalker
rules.description: This unit has the Stealth ability.

rules.name: Auto-repair Nodes
rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, one model in this unit regains 1 lost wound.

rules.name: Sensory Assimilation
rules.description: **^^Winged Tyranid Prime^^** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearerâs unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

rules.name: Ominous Presence
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Add 3 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

rules.name: Dolmen Key
rules.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and when resolving that Stratagem, you can set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units and within range of an objective marker. Until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

rules.name: Parasitic Biomorphology
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit. The first time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more **^^Harvester^^** units, until the end of battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit.

rules.name: Shadesplinter Cloak
rules.description: Unless the bearer is part of an Attached unit at the start of the battle, it has the Lone Operative ability.

rules.name: Regenerating Monstrosity
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only (excluding **^^Monsters^^** models) The bearer's unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

rules.name: Linebreakers
rules.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

rules.name: Starfall Shells
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults Mounted^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

rules.name: Master-crafted Armour
rules.description: Add 1 to armour saving throws made for the bearer.

rules.name: Grim Survivors
rules.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this unit can use this Battle Trait. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If this unit is Below Half-strength when this Battle Trait is used, then until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

rules.name: Daemon Hunter
rules.description: Each time this unit targets an **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll. In addition, at the Update Crusade Cards step, if this unit would gain XP from Dealers in Death, it gains 1 additional XP.

rules.name: Mutagenic Regeneration
rules.description: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer's unit regains 1 lost wound.

rules.name: Sleek Interceptors
rules.description: Each time this unit Advances, do not make Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Titan's Bane
rules.description: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ANTI-MONSTER 4+]** and **[ANTI-VEHICLE 4+]** abilities.

rules.name: Thunderous Blows
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit destroys an enemy unit, subtract 2 from that enemy unit's Out of Action test for this battle.

rules.name: Resolute Veterans
rules.description: Each time you take a Battle-shock, Leadership or Desperate Escape test for this unit, add 1 to that test.

rules.name: Deep Scars
rules.description: Each time a Critical Hit is scored against this unit, thatÂ attack automatically wounds this unit.

rules.name: Trygon Prime
rules.description: **^^Trygon^^** model only. The bearer gains the **^^Synapse^^** keyword. Improve the Strength and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

rules.name: Empyromancer's Focus
rules.description: **^^Psyker^^** model only. The bearer's Psychic weapons gain the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability. In addition, at the end of the Set Warp Events step, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, you can choose to increase or decrease the intensity of the Warp Events use in that battle by 1 (to a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 3).

rules.name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worse that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

rules.name: Monstrous Presence (Aura)
rules.description:
While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit:
- Subtract 1 from the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit.
- Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, the Insane Bravery Stratagem cannot be used.

rules.name: Death Incarnate (Aura)
rules.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

rules.name: Inhuman Integration
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearerâs unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Tyranids^^**units.

rules.name: Adaptive Camouflage
rules.description: This unit has the Stealth ability and if this unit is in Strategic Reserves, it counts the battle round number as one higher than the current battle round number for the purpose of determining when and where it is set up.

rules.name: Ritual of Shrouding (Psychic)
rules.description: At the start of the Deploy Crusade Armies step, you can spend 1RP; if you do, until the end of the battle, each model in this unit has the Infiltrators ability.

rules.name: Fatigued
rules.description: Subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristicÂ of models in this unit and this unit never receives aÂ Charge bonus.

rules.name: Noctilith Armament
rules.description: Select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or upgraded via the Weapon Modifications table). That weapon is now a Crusade Relic; note this on the bearer's Crusade card and give the weapon a suitable name. Once per battle, in the Fight phase, the bearer can activate this Crusade Relic. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made with that weapon, invulnerable saving throws cannot be made against that attack.

rules.name: Raiders
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within range of an objective marker, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

rules.name: Destructive Impulse
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit destroys an enemy unit, add twice as many marks to its Tyrannic War Veteran tally as normal.

rules.name: Adaptive Biology
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

rules.name: Only The Swift Survive
rules.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

rules.name: Chameleonic
rules.description: **^^Vanguard Invader^^** only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

rules.name: Null-field Disruptor
rules.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, invulnerable saving throws cannot be made against that attack.

rules.name: Vantachren's Mirror
rules.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability. In addition, each time the bearer's unit is selected as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll.

rules.name: Natural Leader
rules.description: Each time you take a Battle-shock or Leadership test for this unit, you can re-roll that test.

rules.name: Blade of the Dynast
rules.description: Improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1. Once per battle, in your Charge phase, if your Crusade army is in the Aggressive Strategic Footing, the bearer can activate this Crusade Relic. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

rules.name: Precision Insertion
rules.description:
Once per battle, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a Precision Insertion. If it does, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. Each time this unit performs a Surgical Deep Strike, add 2 to the Deep Strike test.

**Designer's Note:** *Only units that are set up using the Deep Strike ability with benefit from this Battle Trait.*

rules.name: Stealthy Arrival
rules.description:
Each time this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of your next turn, this unit has the Stealth ability and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this unit.

**Designer's Note:** *Only units that are set up using the Deep Strike ability with benefit from this Battle Trait.*

rules.name: Scrier's Gaze (Aura, Psychic)
rules.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.

rules.name: Synaptic Linchpin
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

rules.name: Endless Rage
rules.description: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

rules.name: Blackstone Compass
rules.description: After you win a battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you gain an additional 2 Blackstone Fragments.

rules.name: Single-minded Seeker
rules.description: If the bearer is your **^^Warlord^^**, at the end of the battle, roll one D6, adding 2 to the roll if you won the battle. On a 6+, you gain 3 Blackstone Fragments.

rules.name: Drop Zone Veterans
rules.description:
Each time this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time this unit performs a Surgical Deep Strike, you can re-roll the Deep Strike test.

**Designer's Note:** *Only units that are set up using the Deep Strike ability with benefit from this Battle Trait.*

rules.name: Vanguard Intellect
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only.Â The bearerâs unit can be set up using the Deep StrikeÂ ability in the Reinforcements step of your first,Â second or third Movement phase, regardless of anyÂ mission rules.

rules.name: Fire-point Commander
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that stratagem, hits are successfully scored on a 5+.

rules.name: Hunting Grounds
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+ that unit must make a Battle-shock test.

rules.name: Acquisitive Opportunist
rules.description:
At the start of the battle, if the bearer is your **^^Warlord^^**, until the end of the battle, it gains the ability below that corresponds with the Strategic Footing you selected in the Select Strategic Footing step:

- **Aggressive:** Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
- **Balanced:** The bearer has the Lone Operative ability.
- **Defensive:** Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

rules.name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While a friendly **^^Harvester^^** model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that **^^Harvester^^** model can Regenerate one friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit that is within 9" instead of one within 6".

rules.name: Titan Slayer
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a **^^Titanic^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

rules.name: Periapt of the Righteous
rules.description: Add 2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic. In addition, in your Command phase, you can remove one Warp counter the bearer's unit has. If you do, the bearer regains up to D3 lost wounds.

rules.name: Reinforced Armour
rules.description: Each time an attack with a Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a model in this unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

rules.name: Monstrous Nemesis
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a **^^Monster^^**or **^^Vehicle^^**unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

rules.name: Purgators
rules.description: This unit gains the **^^Grenades^^** keyword. If it already has that keyword, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP.

rules.name: Drop Zone Defenders
rules.description: While this unit is wholly within your deployment zone, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1. Each time an enemy unit performs a Surgical Deep Strike within 9" of this unit, subtract 1 from that unit's Deep Strike test result.

rules.name: Predatory Instincts
rules.description: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Infiltrators ability and, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

rules.name: Rapid Adaptation
rules.description: Select any one of the Battle Honours from the Monster Hunters upgrade path for this unit to gain, regardless of the ones it has already unlocked. The Battle Honour you select does not increase this unit's Crusade points total and does not count as an additional Battle Honour when determining the maximum number of Battle Honours this unit can have.

rules.name: Gloaming Mantle
rules.description: The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability and that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

rules.name: Enraptured Damnation
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearerâs unit.

rules.name: Indomitable Defiance
rules.description: While this unit is within Engagement Range of any enemy **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** models, it automatically passes Battle-shock and Leadership tests.

rules.name: Adrenalised Onslaught
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit makes a Pile In or Consolidation, models in this unit can move an additional 3"

rules.name: Blessed Hull
rules.description: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Headhunters
rules.description: At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit (regardless of how many units in your Crusade army have this Battle Trait). Until the end of the battle, each time a model in this unit makes an attack against that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

rules.name: Prey Taker
rules.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

rules.name: Shard of Shattered Futures
rules.description: At the start of the first battle round, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, you can remove up to three Secondary Mission cards from your Secondary Mission deck and discard them, If you do, you can must then reshuffle your Secondary Mission deck.

rules.name: Null Nodules
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

rules.name: Warp Terrors (Psychic)
rules.description: Once per turn, at the start of your Command phase, Movement phase, Shooting phase, or Charge phase, or the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the test when it does so if it has one or more Warp counters.

rules.name: Lyreth's Mirror
rules.description:
At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up one the battlefield within 12" of the bearer's unit during this phase; the bearer's unit can then either:

- Shoot, but when resolving those attacks the bearer's unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).
- Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, the bearer's unit does not received any Charge bonus this turn).

rules.name: Neuronode
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies,Â you can select up to three **^^Vanguard Invader^^** units from your armyÂ and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units canÂ be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units areÂ already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Wraith of Ruin
rules.description: Models in this unit have the Infiltrators ability.

rules.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
rules.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Advanced Suspensors
rules.description: Ranged Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

rules.name: A Chink in Their Armour
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped in the bearer's unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

rules.name: Strategic Laurels
rules.description: At the start of your first Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP. At the end of the battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you gain 1 Strategic Asset point (SAP).

rules.name: Enhanced Endurance
rules.description: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Blackstone Amulet
rules.description: Each time a melee attack is allocated to the bearer, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks. If that attack was made with a Psychic weapon, this effect applies on an unmodified saving throw of 5+ instead.

rules.name: Riders of Ruin
rules.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Unstoppable Advance
rules.description: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until that move is finished, models in this unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features (they cannot finish a move on top of another model or its base). If doing so when making a Fall Back move, models in this unit do not need to take a Desperate Escape test.

rules.name: Elevated Might
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. The bearerâs unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

rules.name: Veil of Ancients
rules.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Biomorph Adaption
rules.description: **^^Abominant ^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

rules.name: Auto-medicae
rules.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

rules.name: Vortex Grenade
rules.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle. When an attack is made with this weapon, if a hit is scored roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of the target unit (excluding the target unit itself): on a 4+, the unit being rolled for suffers D3 mortal wounds. The target unit then suffers 3D3 mortal wounds.

rules.name: Psychostatic Disruption
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up with 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round, when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves, the bearer can use this enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

rules.name: Fortune's Favoured
rules.description: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save. While this unit has one or more Warp counters, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save (excluding against Psychic Attacks).

rules.name: Hardened Defences
rules.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

rules.name: Vanguard Espionage
rules.description: This unit has the Scouts 9" ability.

rules.name: Fate-forged Weapon
rules.description:
Select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or Crusade Relic, or upgraded with any Battle Traits). That weapon is now a Crusade Relic and:

- Each time an attack is made with it, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
- Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can unleash the power stored in that weapon. When they do, until the end of the turn, that weapon has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability and its Strength and Attacks characteristics are increased by a number equal to the current battle round number.

rules.name: Exorcist's Thurible
rules.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks. In addition, once per battle, just after rolling to generate an Anomaly, you can remove one Warp counter the bearer has. If you do, you can change one of the dice that were part of that roll to a dice result of your choosing (changing the anomaly generated).

rules.name: Hamstringing Attacks
rules.description: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, after resolving its attacks, select one **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, subtract 2" from the Move characteristic of models in that **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

rules.name: Instinctive Defense
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more **^^Harvester^^** units, you can target the bearer's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Harvester^^** units, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

rules.name: Saddleborne Assassins
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

rules.name: Encircling Raptors
rules.description: If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, it counts the battle round number as one higher than the current battle round number for the purpose of determining when and where it is set up.

rules.name: Tempered In Battle
rules.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, this unit can use this Battle Trait. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to shoot, declare a charge and perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back. In addition, this unit is eligible to perform an Action while it is Battle-shocked.

rules.name: Mounted Guerrillas
rules.description: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

rules.name: Beast-ward Barbute
rules.description: Each time a **^^Beast^^** or **^^Monster^^** unit targets the bearer's unit, before making any attacks, that **^^Beast^^** or **^^Monster^^** unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time a model in that **^^Beast^^** or **^^Monster^^** unit makes an attack that targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, if that test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well. In addition, once per battle, in your Command phase, you can select one **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** unit within 18" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** unit loses the **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** keyword and is part of your Crusade army.

rules.name: Empathic Disinclinator
rules.description: At the start of the battle, select one objective marker. While the bearer is on the battlefield, friendly units within range of that objective marker have a 5+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Eye of Mars
rules.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select one unit from your Crusade army and redeploy it. When doing so, you can set that unit up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: United By Adversity
rules.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

rules.name: Onslaught (Aura, Psychic)
rules.description: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit isÂ within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by modelsÂ in that unit have the [ASSAULT] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities.

rules.name: Tireless Raiders
rules.description: Models in this unit can make attacks with ranged weapons even when their unit is within Engagement Range of enemy units, but they can only make such attacks against enemy units that they are within Engagement Range of. In such circumstances, those models can target an enemy unit even if other friendly units are within Engagement Range of the same enemy unit.

rules.name: Deeds That Speak to the Masses
rules.description: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

rules.name: Tip of the Spear
rules.description: This unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

rules.name: Naturalised Camoflage
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, select up to three friendly **^^Endless Multitude^^** units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

rules.name: Tremor Senses
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three friendly **^^Tyranids^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Mark of Shame
rules.description: This unit cannot form an Attached unit, it is unaffectedÂ by the Aura abilities of friendly units, and it cannot beÂ Marked for Greatness.

rules.name: Tartarine Cuirass
rules.description: Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. This is not cumulative with any other modifiers that worsen the Damage characteristic of an attack.

rules.name: Claim Stalker
rules.description: While this unit is within range of an objective marker, it has the Stealth ability.

rules.name: Incendiary Inspiration
rules.description: **^^Magus, Primus or Acolyte Iconward^^** model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

rules.name: Synaptic Tyrant
rules.description: **^^Neurotyrant^^** model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **^^Tyranid Warriors^^** unit.

rules.name: Warp Hunters
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that is an **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** unit, and it is the closest eligible target, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

rules.name: Nameless Tome
rules.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use the New Orders Stratagem for 0CP.

rules.name: Reaper
rules.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an **^^Infantry^^** or **^^Mounted^^** unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

rules.name: Gheist Prism Field
rules.description: Each time the bearer makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until that move is finished, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features (it cannot finish a move on top of another model or its base). If doing so when making a Fall Back move, models in this unit do need to take a Desperate Escape test. After it has finished moving, select one enemy unit it moved across (if any) and roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

rules.name: Crimson Medallion of Bastior
rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

rules.name: Synaptic Strategy
rules.description: **^^Tyranids^^** model only. Once per battle, you can targetÂ the bearerâs unit with the Rapid Ingress stratagem forÂ 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted aÂ different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

rules.name: Fiery Descent
rules.description: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. If this unit performs a Surgical Deep Strike when doing so, before any Deep Strike tests are made, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of your unit: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

rules.name: Hunter's Celerity
rules.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Vengeance Totem
rules.description: When the bearer's unit is destroyed, roll on D6 for every enemy unit within 6": on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then, if the bearer's unit had one or more Warp counters when it was destroyed, you can set up one unit of **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** on the battlefield as close as possible to where the bearer's model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units. The Power Level of this unit is equal to the number of Warp counters the bearer's unit had.

rules.name: Gene-toxin Autofont
rules.description: Select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or Crusade Relic, or upgraded with any Battle Traits). That weapon is now a Crusade Relic and, in your Fight phase, after the bearer has fought, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with this weapon. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player's Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 1, the poison wears off and the unit is no longer poisoned; on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

rules.name: Enraged Reserves
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Monster^^** only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

rules.name: Alien Majesty
rules.description: **^^Abominant^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** or **^^Patriarch^^** model only. While an enemy unit is in within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

rules.name: Cartographic Data-leech
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. While the bearer is embarked within a **^^Transport^^**, each time that **^^Transport^^** is selected to shoot, until end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that **^^Transport^^** as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

rules.name: Juggernaut
rules.description: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this unit's Move characteristic. In addition, each time this unit makes a Normal move, its models can move through sections of terrain features more than 2" in height, but if any do so, just after this unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1-3 this unit is Battle-shocked.

rules.name: Heavily Armoured
rules.description: Once per battle, when attack is allocated to a model in this unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

rules.name: Grimoire Abjuratis
rules.description: Each time a **^^Beast^^** or **^^Monster^^** model makes an attack that targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll. If the attacking model is an **^^Unbound Adversaries^^** unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll as well.

rules.name: Evasive
rules.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model in this unit, provided this unit did not Remain Stationary in your previous turn, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

rules.name: Displacer Field
rules.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's Shooting phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and if it was targeted by one or more attacks during that phase, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If you do, when you next set up the bearer's unit from Strategic Reserves, models in that have the Deep Strike ability until the end of that phase.

rules.name: Warp Alacrity (Psychic)
rules.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls for this unit. In addition, each time this unit is selected to Advance, you can remove one Warp counter from it. If you do, then until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge (even if another rule would let it Advance and Charge in the same turn), but you do not make an Advance roll; instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rules.name: Warp-hardened Veterans
rules.description: Each time this unit is Marked for Greatness, it gains an additional 2XP. In addition, once per battle, in your Command phase, you can add or remove one Warp counter to/from this unit.

rules.name: Disgraced
rules.description: You cannot use any Stratagems to affect this unit andÂ this unit cannot be Marked for Greatness.

rules.name: Cowl of Vehemence
rules.description: **^^Psyker^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a Psychic Attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While the bearer's unit has one or more Warp counters, each time the bearer makes a Psychic Attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

rules.name: Arch Acquisitor
rules.description: Add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of one **^^Character^^** model in this unit.

rules.name: Power of the Hive Mind
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Psyker^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristic of psychic weapons equipped by the wearer of 1.

rules.name: Vanguard Tyrant
rules.description: **^^Winged Hive Tyrant^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

rules.name: Ocular Adaptation
rules.description: **^^Winged Tyranid Prime^^** model only. Each time a model in the bearerâs unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

rules.name: Prowling Agitant
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advanced, or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer's unit, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

rules.name: Heroic Constitution
rules.description: Add 1 to the Wounds characteristic of one **^^Character^^** model in this unit.

rules.name: Synaptic Control
rules.description: **^^Tyranids Synapse^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of the attack.

rules.name: Fearsome Predators (Aura)
rules.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, worsen the Leadership and Objective characteristics of models in that unit by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

rules.name: Strikemasters
rules.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can spend 1 Requisition point; if you do, then until the end of the battle, this unit has the Deep Strike ability and each time this unit performs a Surgical Deep Strike, add 1 to its Deep Strike test.

rules.name: Adaptive Reprisal
rules.description: **^^Genestealer Cults Infantry^^** model only. Once per turn, you can target a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit within 8" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

rules.name: Weapon of Renown
rules.description: Select one melee weapon that the bearer is equipped with (excluding a weapon that has been replaced by an Enhancement or upgraded via the Weapon Modifications Battle Trait). That weapon is now a Crusade Relic and it has the **[ANTI-UNBOUND ADVERSARIES 4+** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

rules.name: Noctilith Sigil
rules.description: Non-**^^Psyker^^** model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

rules.name: Sigil of Sol
rules.description: Once per battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield when you use a Strategic Ploy Stratagem, you can use that Stratagem without spending any CP.

rules.name: Rod of the Omnissiah
rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, the bearer regains up to D3 lost wounds. Once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, if your Crusade army is in the Balanced Strategic Footing, the bearer can activate this Crusade Relic. If it does, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer. That enemy unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the number of wounds the bearer has regained as a result of this Crusade Relic during the battle.

rules.name: Crushing Charge
rules.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

rules.name: Deadly Combatant
rules.description: All melee weapon equipped by **^^Character^^** models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

rules.name: Nodal Map
rules.description: While the bearer is within range of an objective marker, if the bearer's unit is Battle-shocked, change the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit to 1, instead of 0.
